Its lasting significance calls for compassion and a deeper understanding of challenging scenarios.

stories.title: Global Market: China's central bank expands liquidity toolkit with first-ever overnight reverse repos
stories.summary: China's central bank has introduced overnight reverse repo operations for the first time, injecting 300 billion yuan to manage liquidity. This move expands the People's Bank of China's toolkit for short-term funding. An additional 157.5 billion yuan was injected via seven-day reverse repos at an unchanged rate. Policymakers are carefully balancing economic support with financial stability, with markets keenly watching future PBOC actions.

stories.title: Global Market: Japan govt urges BOJ policy coordination as it targets faster economic growth

This ambitious plan, detailed in a draft policy, seeks to boost domestic growth through increased public-private investment and a focus on strategic industries. The government also intends to manage its debt while pursuing expansion, emphasizing close coordination with the Bank of Japan on monetary policy to maintain low borrowing costs.

stories.title: Persistent Systems shares slide 10% after Nagarro deal; Elara retains 'Sell' on growth, margin worries

While this move aims to boost European presence and revenue, analysts express concerns about near-term growth and profitability impacts due to the premium acquisition price and Nagarro's weaker financial performance. The deal, financed by a bridge loan, is expected to reduce US market dependence and expand industry verticals.

stories.title: US Stock Market: Wall Street eyes jobs data as rate hike bets and tech volatility intensify

stories.title: 2 years, zero returns: Is it time for Nifty investors to be fearful or greedy?
